title: Term Insurance Basics
content: Term insurance provides life coverage for a fixed duration and pays a death benefit to nominees if the insured person passes away during the policy term.

title: Health Insurance Coverage
content: Health insurance covers hospitalization expenses, surgeries, medical treatments, and pre and post hospitalization costs depending on policy terms.

title: Smoker Premium Loading
content: Insurance premiums are usually higher for smokers because smoking increases health risks and mortality probability.

title: Claim Settlement Ratio
content: Claim settlement ratio represents the percentage of insurance claims successfully settled by an insurance company.

title: Critical Illness Riders
content: Critical illness riders provide additional payout if the insured is diagnosed with severe illnesses such as cancer, heart disease, or stroke.
